message:
fix(pipeline): enable loop iterations to re-execute steps

Critical bug fix: Loop iterations were only executing steps ONCE across
all iterations due to executedStepIds deduplication in executeStepsById.

Changes:
- Add __loopDepth context variable to track loop nesting
- Skip executedStepIds check when inside a loop (loopDepth > 0)
- Wrap loop execution in try-finally to ensure cleanup on error
- Rename RetryError.cause to originalCause to avoid ES2022 conflict
- Fix Headers.entries() TypeScript compatibility

This enables proper multi-iteration loops where each iteration
executes all configured steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
